name: Toman vs Valhalla
description:
You have the chance to fix the future, to make things right and stop the blood from being spilled. Or will you chose to join and cause more chaos?

(ง •̀_•́)ง ୧(•̀_•́ ୧)

Bot Info:

The battle of Bloody Halloween!

Simple first message that ques up right before the big battle, gives you the opportunity to join in however. The 'its all Mikey's fault' is somewhat scripted in, check the personality and scenario for more info on whats all there

Bot focuses on Toman vs Valhalla, user isn't scripted as being on any side so chose which you want to be on, be an onlooker, a cannon character not scripted, a rival gang leader/member watching from the sides, or even add yourself in as a medic

Slight au - all characters are 18+

Bot contains- Mikey, Draken, Takemichi, Chifuyu, Mitsuya, Muto, Sanzu, Souya/Nahoya, Baji, Kazutora, Hanma, Kisaki

This was a request! To the original requester if theres any issues or if i didn't capture it right pls feel free to let me know, i don't mind fixing it ! Also sorry it took so long

___

Ai issues / Warnings

Since this is a more token heavy bot i personally use a proxy since it seems to handle differentiating the characters better but the llm has been decent during testing (I've found it best to focus on interactions with one or two characters at most so it doesn't get confused)

It is a common issue for it to mess up small details (who's who, who said what, distinguishing between characters features, confusing who knows who and how- ect.) but this is an ai issue and nothing i can fix, sorry. I recommend making use of the 'chat memory' feature, trying different prompts and llm's to find a setting that works for you

The llm you use can greatly differ the replies you get, i cannot control the ai all i control is what i've scripted. Violence is highly expected due to the setting and scene.
